zh.lifeSummary: 當Agatha de Theray de Kryton於大約1120年出生在英國林可爾史爾格藍福德 布里奇時，她的父親Richard de Theray23歲，母親Eleanor Beaumont21歲。她於大約1145年與Hamon de Massey III在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾帕茨 本 林賽結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1216年在英國英格蘭爾鄧翰 梅西享年97歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agatha de Theray de Kryton于大约1120年出生在英国林可爾史爾格藍福德 布里奇时，她的父亲Richard de Theray23岁，母亲Eleanor Beaumont21岁。她于大约1145年与Hamon de Massey III在英国英格兰林可爾史爾帕茨 本 林賽结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1216年在英国英格兰爾鄧翰 梅西享年97岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Theray

nameMeanings.name: Agatha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Agnes   and   Agatha .

variants.name: Agnes
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Agatha de Theray de Kryton was born about 1120, in Glanford Bridge, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Richard de Theray, was 23 and her mother, Eleanor Beaumont, was 21. She married Hamon de Massey III about 1145, in Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1216, in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 97.

Elle a épousé Hamon de Massey III environ 1145, à Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1216, à Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 97 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agatha de Theray de Kryton è nata il circa 1120 nel Glanford Bridge, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Richard de Theray, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Beaumont, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Hamon de Massey III circa 1145, nel Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1216, nel Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 97 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agatha de Theray de Krytonが約1120年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアグランフォード ブリッジで生まれた時，父Richard de Therayは23歳，母Eleanor Beaumontは21歳であった。約1145年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアパーツ オフ リンドセイでHamon de Massey IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1216年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダンハム マセイで97歳で死去した。

ko.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 파르츠 프 린지
ko.lifeSummary: Agatha de Theray de Kryton(이)가 대략 1120년 영국 링코실르 글랜퍼드 브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Theray(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Beaumont(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1145년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 파르츠 프 린지에서 Hamon de Massey III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1216년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 던함 마시에서 97세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: парц оф линдси, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agatha de Theray de Kryton родилась около 1120 г. в местности гланфорд бридж, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Theray было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Beaumont, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hamon de Massey III около 1145 г. в местности парц оф линдси, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1216 г. в местности дунам масси, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 97 лет.
